features.featureTitle: Create a new Admin Dashboard page at route '/admin' in the frontend. The page must have three tabbed sections: (1) 'Callback Requests' — displays a table of all customer callback requests with columns: customer name, phone number (unmasked for admin), listing ID, preferred time slot, and date/time submitted; (2) 'Bookings & Payments' — displays a table of all booked car listings with columns: car (make, model, year), registration number, seller name, booking status, receipt file name, and booked-at timestamp; (3) 'All Listings / Purchase Inquiries' — displays a table of all car listings with columns: ID, make, model, year, city, asking price, status (available/sold/booked), and posted date. Each table must be sortable by date (newest first) and include a total count at the top of each tab. Style the dashboard consistently with the AutoHub red-orange and dark-grey theme.

Add a visible 'Admin Dashboard' link in the site Navbar (desktop and mobile menu) pointing to '/admin'. The link should be labeled 'Admin' and placed at the far right of the desktop nav or at the bottom of the mobile menu. Style it as a subtle secondary link (not the primary CTA button) consistent with the existing navbar theme.
